description_long: This doll features a highly stylized, cartoonish figure with a black, ink-like body and exaggerated proportions. Its head is large and cat-like, with pointed ears and a wide, menacing grin filled with sharp, yellow teeth. The face and hands are a contrasting yellowish color, with the hands appearing oversized and expressive. The body is elongated and slender, with long, thin arms and legs, and the surface texture appears rough and uneven, as if covered in dripping ink. The doll's posture is rigid, with arms outstretched horizontally and legs straight, giving it a T-pose stance. The overall aesthetic is reminiscent of vintage animation characters, with a dark, slightly sinister twist.
description: A black, ink-dripped cartoon doll with a large grinning head, yellow hands, and exaggerated limbs in a T-pose. The surface is rough and the style is reminiscent of vintage animation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, one yellow hand, and the pointed, cat-like head with visible facial features.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, the outstretched arms, and the long, tapering body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the other yellow hand visible, showing the same elongated proportions and ink-dripped texture.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide, toothy grin, both yellow hands, and the full T-pose with arms extended.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll's body is entirely black with a rough, ink-dripped texture, and the hands and face are painted yellow, evoking a stylized, animated character look.
attribute_pose: Arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide, menacing grin with sharp, yellow teeth; eyes are open and fixed, giving a sinister, animated expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth, black, and pointed with cat-like ears.
